arts.ttl: Approach made: Leeds ready to complete bargain deal they have been monitoring all season
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is looking to add to his forward options at Leeds United for the second half of the 2024/25 campaign and the Championship club have an eye on Maccabi Tel Aviv’s Dor Turgeman. Leeds are currently third in the Championship and have put themselves in a great position to return to the Premier League. arts.ttl: Contrasting new Leeds United transfer update emerges on £8.3m ‘scouting mission’
arts.sum: Leeds United have again been mentioned in the pursuit of Hammarby’s young striker Jusef Erabi, having been previously linked in the summer. Hammarby striker Jusef Erabi was a reported transfer target for Leeds during the summer window, but no action was taken on the matter as the Whites explored other positions and options.

arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Derby County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Leeds United and Derby County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Former Barcelona man a doubt for Derby County clash as Leeds United ace also ruled out
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has confirmed that defender Sam Byram will miss the clash against Derby County while Junior Firpo is also a doubt. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Darko Gyabi, Plymouth recall clause confirmed
arts.sum: Leeds United midfielder Darko Gyabi is looking to help Plymouth Argyle avoid relegation again this season, but his loan there does include a brief recall clause during the January window. Confirmed: Gyabi loan recall clause revealed as Leeds plot January decision

arts.ttl: Ethan Ampadu's surprise Leeds United return and Farke's exception for 'most important player'
arts.sum: An appearance against Derby County this weekend is likely to come too soon, but Farke has admitted he is tempted to recall his captain earlier than the two to three weeks period he would normally wait before bringing an injured player back into the side. He is our captain and the most important player in the whole squad and for that I am tempted to bring him in a little bit earlier instead of waiting two or three weeks.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne 'can't believe' Leeds United claim as £143m Derby County challenge crystal clear
arts.sum: Paul Warne cannot believe that Daniel Farke is under any pressure and says there is no expectation on Derby County heading to Leeds United this weekend (12.30pm). Every time Leeds do lose though, and obviously I've watched the Blackburn game in entirety, and we've shown a lot of that to the lads today, they always seem to bounce back.

arts.ttl: Leeds United sweat on fitness of two men as Daniel Farke faces problem after Byram blow
arts.sum: The absence of both would give Farke a tricky decision, with Isaach Schmidt available but not fully fit, while Max Wober is an option, but not a natural one. Leeds United boss Daniel Farke will sweat on the fitness of full-back Junior Firpo after revealing the defender picked up a training ground injury which makes him a real doubt for this weekend.

arts.ttl: New Leeds United setback emerges, but huge Ethan Ampadu update shared
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is a doubt for the clash against Derby County due to an injury picked up in training this week. Leeds team news pre-Derby: Junior Firpo doubt, Byram out

arts.ttl: “I had my doubts” – Player was nervous when joining Leeds United, now grateful for experience
arts.sum: Crysencio Summerville has revealed he had doubts over joining Leeds United. The winger came up through the ranks of Feyenoord’s youth system and left them to join Leeds in 2020. The former Leeds man has been speaking to Voetbal International about his career so far and his comments are relayed by 1908.nl.
